nodes.name: Google Sheets Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers when a new row is added to 'Employee Data' sheet. Header is row 3, data starts at row 4.

nodes.name: Process & Evaluate Row
nodes.notes: Calculates attendance%, absence%, determines status (Top Performer / Warning / Normal), and builds Telegram + Email messages.

nodes.name: Is Warning?
nodes.notes: Routes Warning employees to urgent path. True = Warning, False = Normal/Top Performer.

nodes.name: Telegram - Send Alert
nodes.notes: Sends instant Telegram notification for Warning employees. Replace YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.

nodes.name: Gmail - Send Alert
nodes.notes: Sends HTML email report. Replace YOUR_EMAIL@gmail.com with the recipient address.

nodes.name: Telegram - Send Normal Report
nodes.notes: Sends Telegram message for Normal / Top Performer employees.

nodes.name: Gmail - Send Normal Report
nodes.notes: Sends HTML email for Normal / Top Performer employees.

nodes.name: Log to Sheet (Warning)
nodes.notes: Appends Warning records to a 'Logs' sheet. Create this sheet manually first with these column headers.

nodes.name: Log to Sheet (Normal)
nodes.notes: Appends Normal/Top Performer records to 'Logs' sheet.

nodes.name: Daily Cron (8:00 AM)
nodes.notes: Fires every day at 8:00 AM to trigger the daily summary report. Adjust time as needed.

nodes.name: Read All Rows
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from Employee Data sheet for daily summary analysis.

nodes.name: Build Daily Summary
nodes.notes: Aggregates all employee data, finds top performer and highest absent, builds Telegram + HTML email summary.

nodes.name: Telegram - Daily Summary
nodes.notes: Sends the daily summary report to your Telegram channel/group.

nodes.name: Gmail - Daily Summary
nodes.notes: Sends the daily HTML summary report via Gmail.

nodes.name: Log Daily Summary to Sheet
nodes.notes: Appends daily summary to 'Summary' sheet. Create this sheet with these column headers first.
